name: ZeroStack Corp.
business: ZeroStack Corp. is a decentralized AI treasury and AI-focused asset management company that invests in AI infrastructure through strategic ownership in 0G Tokens. It also operates as a global pharmaceutical distributor via its wholly owned subsidiary Phatebo GmbH, which wholesales pharmaceutical products internationally.
sellsTo: Pharmaceutical distributors and healthcare providers in Europe, Asia, Latin America, and North America

exposures.sentence: Our first AI-oriented project is through strategic ownership in 0G Tokens (as defined below).
The Company is a global pharmaceutical distributor through its wholly owned subsidiary Phatebo GmbH ("Phatebo").
We are a decentralized AI treasury and AI-focused asset management company that is investing in the future of AI.

catalysts.sentence: On May 2, 2025, the Company entered into a securities purchase agreement with certain investors (the "May 2025 Investors") in connection with the issuance and sale by the Company to the May 2025 Investors via a private placement ("the May 2025 Private Placement") of an aggregate of 80,340 Common Shares ...
On August 4, 2025, the Company effected a 1-for-39 share consolidation of the Company's issued and outstanding Common Shares ...

On September 19, 2025, the Company entered into securities purchase agreements with certain investors pursuant to which the Company agreed to sell and issue the following securities in private placement offerings (collectively, the "PIPE Offering"): ...

catalysts.event: Sale of Legacy Hemp and Cannabis Business
catalysts.sentence: On September 26, 2025, the Company transferred the Transferred Interests to Flora Growth US Holdings LLC ... in exchange for full satisfaction of the balance receivable under the promissory notes issued by the Company to such Noteholders ...

On October 1, 2025, the Board appointed Mr. Daniel Reis-Faria and Michael Heinrich as non-independent directors of the Board, and in connection with their appointments to the Board, Mr. Reis-Faria, was also appointed as the Chief Executive Officer of the Company and Mr. Heinrich was also appointed as Executive Chairman effective October 1, 2025.
On December 29, 2025, we entered into the Note Settlement Agreement with the Note Investor pursuant to which the Note was settled.

catalysts.event: Appointment of Laurence Zeifman as Director
catalysts.sentence: On January 6, 2026, the Board unanimously approved by written consent the appointment of Mr. Laurence Zeifman as a director of the Company, as a member (and Chair) of the audit committee of the Board ...

tamClaims.claim: The European pharmaceutical industry has a projected CAGR of 6.3% between 2023 and 2028 resulting in total sales of $290 billion by 2028.
tamClaims.sentence: The industry has a projected CAGR of 6.3% between 2023 and 2028 resulting in total sales of $290 billion by 2028 1 .

tamClaims.claim: Germany was the leading pharmaceutical market in the European Union with a total revenue of $69 million in 2024.
tamClaims.sentence: In the European Union, Germany was the leading pharmaceutical market with a total revenue of $69 million in 2024 2 .
